raw_consumer_statement:
A purchase for over {$900.00} was made on a Best Buy store on XXXX XXXX, FL according to my account statement. According to the Best Buy representative, this purchase was made in person with a physical card. 
I was in XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX to the XXXX. The purchase was made on XX/XX/XXXX without my authorization. 

I found out about this Monday XX/XX/XXXX, when I got a phone call and an email regarding a late payment. Since I do not use this card, I was surprised and I checked the account. As my surprise I had a balance due for over {$900.00} dollars plus late fee and interest. I immediately contacted Best Buy 's number behind the card and did a police report today. What has me preoccupied is that my mailing address, where I was getting my mail from Best Buy was in a UPS store, where I have a mail box. All my addresses were changed to my apartment building but since I don't use Best Buy, I forgot to change that one. I have my suspicions on the store because if someone ordered a new card, then they took it from there. 

I have not received any info back and I am very worried about my credit score, I take really good care of it and this crime is freaking me out. 
Attached you will find photos of the bank statement ( it got wet I apologize ), prove of my passport and the stamps that show when did I fly to XXXX and came back to the US, and prove of the FAX that was sent to Best Buy of my passport evidence. Also, the claim number and the police report case number.
